label: Improved
items: A plant's page now tells its whole story in one place — the new "In your garden" tab shows what's growing, what's in the nursery (sowings and seed packets), and a history of past plants with one-tap restore.
Opening a watched ailment now shows exactly which of your plants it's affecting right now (and who spotted it), plus its history in your garden — including past area-scan sightings.
